getMeritList(int, int) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel

getValue(String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.PropertyReader
Retrieves the string value associated with the specified configuration key.
getValue(String, String) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.PropertyReader
Retrieves the string value associated with the specified key and replaces the standard {0} placeholder token with a single runtime parameter string.
getValue(String, String[]) - Static method in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.PropertyReader
Retrieves the string value associated with the specified key and sequentially replaces multi-index placeholder patterns like {0}, {1}, etc., using an array of parameter strings.
